_metadata.description: Maps human-readable field labels (from calculator.aws UI) to internal API field IDs used by the AWS Pricing Calculator API. Derived from saved estimates at d3knqfixx3sbls.cloudfront.net and calculator.aws service definitions.
_metadata.notes: fieldId values are the keys in calculationComponents. Fields prefixed with _autosuggest: or _radio are special UI interaction types handled by the FieldProcessor. version is from the CDN service definition. defaultValue is the sensible default for API submission. allowedValues lists valid options for dropdown/radio fields. unit specifies the API unit format.

Enter Amount.notes: Table field with entryType, value, unit, fromRegion columns

Engine.notes: API value is a hash like x4dSskWC2UA5R5dVtIkM0EjZJQKU02zll08quzox15U

Nodes.notes: Number of nodes in the instance table row
